title: Reset Villager Trades
description: Reset a villager trade if it sells items you don't want, makes getting good librarians much easier for 1.12.2
body:
Tired of trying to get a good librarian villager? Just can't find that mending villager? 

Well this mod changes all of that. It adds a reset button "R" onto the vilager trade screen, which allows you to manually regenerate the villagers trade items!

![Villager R](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c35679ab714eb242576418d8b46d9363645d344a.png)
